site.title: PostCompare.eu
site.description: Free and independent European postal rate comparator. Find the best price for your letters and parcels.

results.title: Results
results.no_results: No results found for this search.

about.title: About PostCompare.eu
about.intro: PostCompare.eu is a free and independent comparator for postal rates across Europe.
about.methodology_text: Prices are collected manually from national postal services' official websites. Prices from non-eurozone countries are converted to EUR at the exchange rate on the date of collection.
about.neutrality_text: This site is purely informational. We have no commercial relationship with any of the listed postal operators.
about.open_source_text: The source code and data are available on GitHub. Contributions are welcome.

contribute.title: Contribute to PostCompare.eu
contribute.intro: PostCompare.eu data is maintained by the community. You can help keep rates up to date.
contribute.report_text: Open a GitHub Issue specifying the operator, product, and correct price.
contribute.fix_text: Edit the relevant operator's YAML file and open a Pull Request.
contribute.step2: Edit the YAML file in data/operators/
contribute.step3: Verify the schema is valid: npm run validate
contribute.step4: Open a Pull Request with the source of your data

hero.title: Compare postal rates from 32 European countries
hero.subtitle: Free, independent, open source

how.title: How it works
how.step1_text: Letter or parcel, weight, origin and destination country
how.step2_text: National postal rates are displayed sorted by price
how.step3_text: Visit the official website of the cheapest operator

footer.disclaimer: Prices shown are indicative and may be inaccurate. Always verify on the operator's official website.
